[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a mobile payment confirmation screen with a blue background, a yellow check button, and transaction details text.

A large yellow circular icon with a check mark sits centered above bold white text. The screen displays payment status text in Indonesian and a large formatted currency value, with two rounded buttons at the bottom.

The setting appears to be a smartphone app interface viewed vertically, with a dark top status bar and a bright blue main area. Lighting is uniform as it is a digital screen capture, with no physical environment shown.

The composition is centered: the yellow check icon is near the middle, followed by three lines of white text: the first line smaller and the next lines larger. At the bottom are two horizontally centered rounded buttons: the upper button is white with blue text, and the lower button is blue/outlined with white text. The top status bar includes visible icons and text elements.

Visible Text:
23.55
Rp 5.350.379
Cobain DANA
Terbayar ke
mhdilyasenzzzu
Rp5.000.000
DETAIL TRANSAKSI
TUTUP

Practical Summary:
This image is a screenshot of a mobile payment screen indicating a completed payment. It shows the recipient text and the transaction amount, with options to view transaction details or close the screen.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

- The recipient name text **“mhdiliyasenzz u”** includes a space before the final **“u”**; may be part of the original formatting but is shown exactly as it appears.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
